query: Successful checkout using a valid credit card with correct card number, expiry, and CVV — payment is accepted and order is confirmed
Checkout fails because the customer's credit card expiry date has passed — system displays an expired card error and prevents payment processing
Payment rejected at checkout due to an invalid or malformed credit card number that fails Luhn algorithm validation
Credit card payment declined because the entered CVV security code does not match the card's verification value
Payment gateway enforces a minimum transaction threshold — orders below the minimum amount are blocked before processing
Checkout attempted with a zero-value cart total — system behavior when no payable amount exists and payment step is reached
Tampered payment request containing a negative transaction amount — security validation must reject negative or manipulated price values
Credit card payment declined by the bank because the cardholder has insufficient funds or credit limit is exceeded
Payment transaction declined or rejected by the issuing bank — downstream bank refusal handling during the checkout payment flow
Attacker injects malicious SQL code into the cardholder name input during payment — system must sanitize input and prevent database query manipulation
XSS attack via script tag injected into the billing address field at checkout — stored or reflected cross-site scripting vulnerability test
Bot-driven brute force attack cycling through many card numbers at the payment step — rate limiting and fraud detection must block enumeration attempts
PCI-DSS violation: cardholder credit card number or CVV appears in plaintext server-side logs — sensitive payment data must never be logged unmasked
Payment module security test suite covering SQL injection, XSS in billing fields, plaintext card data in logs, request tampering, and automated card enumeration attacks
Successful user authentication using a valid registered email address and correct password — user is logged in and redirected to the authenticated session
User account is temporarily locked after exceeding the maximum number of consecutive failed login attempts — brute force lockout policy is enforced
Attacker inputs SQL injection payload into the username field on the login form — authentication bypass via database query manipulation must be prevented
CAPTCHA challenge is displayed to the user after repeated failed login attempts — bot mitigation triggered after threshold of authentication failures
Login security test suite covering SQL injection in username, credential stuffing, account lockout after failed attempts, and CAPTCHA enforcement for bot prevention
New user successfully completes account registration with a valid unique email, strong password, and all required fields — account is created and confirmation is sent
Registration fails because the chosen password does not meet minimum strength requirements — system enforces password complexity policy during account creation
Registration attempt rejected because the submitted email address is already associated with an existing account — duplicate account prevention during sign up
XSS attack via script tag or JavaScript payload injected into registration form fields — stored cross-site scripting vulnerability during new account creation
Registration blocked because the user's date of birth indicates they are below the minimum age requirement — age verification enforcement during account sign up
Customer attempts to add more units to the cart than are available in inventory — stock validation prevents overselling when requested quantity exceeds stock level
Add-to-cart blocked because the customer has not selected required product variants such as size or color — mandatory attribute validation before adding to basket
Shopping cart cannot accept additional products because the maximum number of distinct line items or total quantity has been reached — cart capacity limit enforced
Account deletion flow requires the user to re-enter their current password as confirmation — re-authentication step prevents accidental or unauthorized account removal
After account deletion, all personal data including profile, order history, and PII is permanently purged from the system — GDPR right-to-erasure compliance verification
Account deletion test suite covering password re-confirmation, active order restrictions, data purge of personal information, GDPR erasure compliance, and post-deletion access prevention
